# David's AI Daily Brief

> A daily distillation of The AI Daily Brief podcast, filtered through an
> NHS / general-practice lens (GP's Corner). Personal, non-commercial.

## Today

- [Latest brief](https://davids-ai-brief.netlify.app/): today's edition (HTML)
- [Structured data](https://davids-ai-brief.netlify.app/brief.json): today's brief as JSON

## Archive & audio

- [Archive](https://davids-ai-brief.netlify.app/archive): all past briefs
- [Podcast feed](https://davids-ai-brief.netlify.app/feed.xml): daily 3-min audio (RSS)

## Notes for agents

- Each edition has fixed sections: One Idea, GP's Corner, NLW's Takes, Headlines.
- GP's Corner is AI commentary, not from the podcast. Source links resolve to aidailybrief.ai.
